name: Emeril's Calzone
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh oregano, chopped or 1 teaspoon Dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix yeast and warm water. Stir until combined.
2. Add basil, salt, sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, and olive oil to the yeast mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture and stir until a dough forms.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface. Knead for a few minutes until smooth.
5. Shape the dough into a rectangle. Roll each section into three equal pieces.
6. Add filling to each piece: onions, ground pork, bell pepper, garlic, white wine, salt, and pepper.
7. Roll up each section tightly. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Filling Instructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add diced onions and sauté until translucent.
3. Add ground pork, bell pepper, garlic, white wine, salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cook until the pork is fully cooked through.
